# Transcrição: 06-Tutorial_ Using Your Social Media Planner

- **Fonte:** 06-Tutorial_ Using Your Social Media Planner
- **Duração:** 02:48
- **Idioma:** en

---

## [00:00 - 02:48]

Now let's take a look into our social planner so you know how to plan and schedule your social media content in advance. To do this inside of the Mash My Business Hub, we'll first select email and social media from the left hand menu. The page you'll automatically be defaulted to is the social planner page which is perfect for this walkthrough. And to connect your social media accounts, you'll go ahead and select this widget followed by Add Account. Here you'll be prompted to connect different accounts such as Google My Business, Facebook Pages, Instagram, LinkedIn, X, as well as TikTok. For whichever account or accounts you would like to connect, you can go ahead and select on the icon and you'll be prompted with the action steps to log in to connect your business accounts for each. Let's say you wanted to batch create your content, meaning you wanted to spend one day filming out all of your social media content for, let's say the next month, you can do that and schedule them to be posted through the Mash My Business Hub. That way you're automating your posting and giving yourself time back throughout the week. To create a post and schedule it to be posted, you can do that by selecting New Post followed by Create New Post. From here, it will ask you to select which social accounts you wanted to connect. Here you can see I have three accounts connected and I can choose them individually of which ones I wanted to post on or I can simply select Select All. From here, you will be able to draft your content to be posted across each of these platforms or you can simply toggle this button here to customize your post for each platform. You can type in your content description and even add in video or photo content. I'll go ahead and upload a photo from our media library here inside of the hub and double select my image. From here, you can see how it will be displayed across your different platforms. This is an example of what it looks like on Google My Business, Facebook Pages and my Instagram Business account. From here, you can choose to post this across platforms immediately or you can simply select this drop down to schedule your post from there. Once you've scheduled your post, you can go ahead and select Open Planner and this will show you your months outline of what is scheduled to be posted. You can post not only one month, not only two months, but years in advance for your content. All right, and that is your quick tour on our social planner. Stay tuned for more updates inside of your social planner as we begin to add in more networks. Thank you so much for watching this tutorial and happy posting!
